name: Lindy Chamberlain: The True Story
overview: 40 years after Azaria Chamberlain’s disappearance, Lindy Chamberlain and her children speak exclusively and in detail, about that harrowing night and the devastating years that followed. From the hatred and discrimination the family endured to Lindy’s years in prison, nothing is off limits in this powerful and moving documentary.

trailers.title: Lindy Chamberlain: The True Story. Coming Soon To 10 And WIN Network.
